title: rubus × nudiflorens
intro: Rubus × nudiflorens is a hybrid plant between the Japanese raspberry (Rubus fruticosus) and the Himalayan raspberry (Rubus bifrons). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × nudiflorens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against certain types of cancer. Rubus × nudiflorens is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or dried extract, and can also be found in some dietary supplements.
